title: Same transaction, same facts, same bench, different orders: NCLAT pulls up NCLT
description: The National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) recently set aside the admission of insolvency proceedings against Equinox India Developments Limited, now known as Embassy Developments Limited, in a case filed by Canara Bank. (Rajesh Kaimal v. Prabhat Ranjan Singh)A coram of Chairperson Justice Ashok Bhushan and Technical Member Barun Mitra allowed an appeal filed by Rajesh Kaimal, suspended director of the corporate debtor, against a December 9, 2025 order of the National Company Law Tribun
